feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: B1i Error OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space (failed to allocate 206995144 bytes) (max heap: 4096 MB)
entry.content:
Hello, 
since a few days we have a problem/Technical Error in B1i (Version 1.22.39)

Message:
com.sap.b1i.xcellerator.XcelleratorException:
XCE001 Nested exception: com.sap.b1i.bizprocessor.BizProcException:
BPE001 Nested exception: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError:
Java heap space (failed to allocate 206.995.144 bytes) (max heap: 4096 MB)

I can't understand the Error... 206 MB <> 4096 MB ???
Do you need more details about our system for possible solutions?

Thank you for your help

Greetings
Markus

entry.title: Add BOM Lines and Route Stage with Bill of Materials Management
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to add a route and a resource for all items that have a Bill of Materials (BOM). I can add the resource from the Bill of Materials management document, but I cannot add it together with the route. Is it possible to add both the route and the desired resource under it directly from the Bill of Materials management document?

Thanks,

Regard

entry.title: Unit Price doesn't appear in BOM when I change UoM Group in Item master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created a new UoM Group "Coil" with inside different lenghts of coil in centimeter

After, I created a new item B2.680.35.07 with this new UoM Group ,then I created new PO with this item, then I closed the order with a Invoice (in order to load the price unit in SAP price list) IMAGE 1

 

When I open my BOM with inside this item, doesn't appear the unit price so I don't know cost of BOM (IMAGE 2)

Please note that appear price unit of only items with SAP default UoM Group (not price unit of item with new UoM group)

What's happen? Someone can help me to solve this matter?

entry.title: Query of Closing Stock as per GL Account
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I want a Closing Stock with respect to Closing Stock G/L account with period selection. Data require as per follows :

G/L Acct/BP CodeG/L acct NameLocal Currency - O.B.Local Currency - DebitLocal Currency - CreditLocal Currency - Accu.DebitLocal Currency - Accu.CreditLocal Currency - Balance

entry.title: Avatax Rates by Address in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Is anyone using the native SAP Business One Avatax Rates by Address integration problem free and able to use it through the DIAPI?

We are getting intermittent 'Cannot connect to the Electronic Document Service' errors when using it through the SAP Client and no consistent failures when adding or updating records through the DIAPI.

It falls into the support gap between SAP and Avalara and our SAP Dev Partner has reached the end of his tether trying to diagnose/isolate exactly where/why it fails.

As an aside - it is unable to cope with the full 9 digit USA zip code - it only supports the first 5 characters, but is not smart enough to trim along zip code.

If anyone has this problem or has crossed this bridge, please let get in touch?

grant@delecuona.com

entry.title: SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down
entry.content:
Hi All,

While installing SBO 2411, SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down :

 

Any suggestions on what needs to be done?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: How to add new filter definition in B1if 1.0
entry.content:
Hi,

Anyone knows where to define these filter field in B1if 1.0? And how to add new rows in this setup wizard?

Thanks!

entry.title: Hola, Necesito validar que usuario usuario esta realizando la modificación a un documento por TN.
entry.content:
Necesito validar que ciertos usuarios sean los que puedan hacer alguna edición sobre cualquier asiento contable de la base de datos. Tengo SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 y SQL.

¿Hay alguna forma de validar el usuario que esta ejecutando la actualización?

Saludos,

Nor

entry.title: Extending the Item Master Data Detail page via SAP B1 UI API for the WebClient
entry.content:
Greetings Everyone,

I wanted to ask if it is possible to extend the page of the details of an Item (which is usually accessed by clicking the corresponding row in the Item Master Data page) in the SAP B1 Web Client. I tried to create an UI API extension which adds elements like buttons, but, when I select the System Objects, I do not get an option for the Item details page.
I also noticed that the web client extension doesn't detect the page for some reason (which prevents me from getting the GUID of the Item Master Data Detail page and it is non existent in the browser's element inspector).
Is there a solution or is there no support at all?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Can the expiration date of raw materials be used for MRP planning in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
I am looking for a solution for a biomedical and chemistry company to run MRP based on the expiration dates of raw materials. The goal is to generate recommendations for production orders and purchase orders.

Can the MRP check for expired batches during the planning period in the future?

If the MRP can check the expiration date information of raw materials, can it identify expired batches and recommend a plan for purchasing new materials?

entry.title: User wise Document Series Production Order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How can we set default document series for users.

entry.title: Error Handling with API Gateway vs Service Layer in SAP
entry.content:
When using the Service Layer to post, for example, an order, I receive detailed error messages similar to what is displayed in the SAP Business One (SBO) client if something is not correct.

Now, I’m trying to migrate to the API Gateway to leverage new resources like reports. However, I’ve encountered an issue with error handling. In case of an error, I only receive a "503 Service Unavailable" response code, accompanied by the following response body:

{"code":503,"message": "Internal Server Error resulted from Runtime Exception"}

And it's the same for any endpoint or any kind of error.

How can I get more meaningful error messages when using the API Gateway, similar to what is provided by the Service Layer?

entry.title: SAP Business One - Certified Consultant Exam
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone give me a link to the SAP Business One - Certified Consultant exam? 
The only one I found doesnt say certified consultant, this is from the site.

SAP Certified Associate - SAP Business One
This certification verifies that you possess the fundamental knowledge in the areas of implementation, logistics, financials and SAP Business One support and proves that you are able to work under the guidance of an experienced consultant to implement their first SAP Business One implementation project.

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-business-one

it gives the following error when connecting

entry.title: what is Acquisition field in purchase order in sap b1
entry.content:
i see this field (Acquisition) in purchase order and i didnt found any explanations,

can someone help me to figure this out

entry.title: Integration of Ariba Sourcing, SLP, and Business Network with SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Has anyone had experience integrating Ariba Sourcing, SLP, and Business Network with SAP Business One?

While reviewing the available documentation, I’m uncertain whether it’s feasible to achieve this via CIG.

Additionally, I have the option to use Azure Bus as middleware if necessary.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: PO Vendor Name in GRPO Query
entry.content:
Hi All

Please advise how to add Purchase Order Vendor Name to this GRPO Query?

SELECT T0.[CreateDate] as 'GRPO Create Date', T1.[DocEntry] as 'GRPO Doc No.', T0.[DocDate] 'GRPO Date', T0.[DocStatus] as 'Doc Status', T0.[U_BLNO] as 'B/L No.', T0.[NumAtCard] as 'DO No.', T0.[U_CONTREF], T0.[U_WSLIP], T0.[U_SUPWSLIP] as 'Supplier Weighslip No.', T0.[U_RECWSLIP] as 'Receiver Weighslip No.', T0.[CardCode] as 'Vendor Code', T0.[CardName] as 'Vendor Name', T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[Quantity] as 'GRPO Qty', T0.[U_PO_VW] as 'Supplier Qty', T0.[U_OTHERWEIGHT] as 'Receiver Qty', T1.[WhsCode], T1.[BaseDocNum] as 'PO No.', T0.[U_LOGREMARKS] as 'Logistics Remarks', T2.[DocDate] as 'GR Date', T2.[DocEntry] as 'GR Doc No.', T2.[Quantity] as 'GR Qty' FROM OPDN T0 LEFT JOIN PDN1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry LEFT JOIN RPD1 T2 ON T1.DocEntry = T2.BaseEntry AND T1.ItemCode = T2.ItemCode WHERE T0.[CardName] = [%0] AND T1.[BaseDocNum] = [%1]

ORDER BY T0.[DocDate], T1.[DocEntry]

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: How to update Inventory Counting UoM Code by DTW
SAP B1 profit & loss statement has recorded a cost transaction twice. Can someone let me know why?
entry.content:
When I run the general ledger report for the nominal ledger code and view the transactions in the "Account Balance" I can only see one entry (this specific example is for a £17.56 bank charge debited to the Bank Charges account code). However when I run the p/l the total value is exactly £17.56 extra so it looks like SAP has added an extra £17.56 but I don't know why

NB - there are no "BN" entries

Account Balance view:

Profit and loss statement showing £96.32 charge for the period rather than £78.76:

entry.title: Landed Costs with Fixed Assets shows error
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.270) SP 2411. While creating Landed Costs document with fixed assets, I have faced with this error: "[Landed Costs - Rows - Duty Rate][line: 10] , 'No matching records found 'GL Accounts' (OACT) (ODBC -2028)' [Message 131-183]". I attached screencast of issue. What is the duty rate in the rows? There is no this column. 

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA
